title: polypodium androgynum var. tetragonum
intro: Polypodium androgynum var. tetragonum, also known as Polypodium tetragonum, is a type of fern that belongs to the Polypodiaceae family and is native to Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, as it contains compounds with anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Polypodium tetragonum include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
